title: Holy Cross Shrine Mapranam
tagline: Holy Cross Shrine Mapranam — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Mar Sleeva Syro-Malabar Church, Mapranam (Malayalam: മാപ്രാണം മാർ സ്ലീവാ പള്ളി), Thrissur is one of the few churches in Asia which has received the relic of the Holy Cross, part of
overview.description: Mar Sleeva Syro-Malabar Church, Mapranam (Malayalam: മാപ്രാണം മാർ സ്ലീവാ പള്ളി), Thrissur is one of the few churches in Asia which has received the relic of the Holy Cross, part of the Holy blood of Jesus Christ and a piece of the towel used by Veronica to wipe the face of Jesus Christ, during the journey of the Passion, all donated from Vatican by the order of the Pope Leo XIII. Believed to have been constructed in AD 928, it is one of the oldest churches not only in Kerala state, India, but also in India. North of it lies Karuvannur River, the Arattupuzha Temple and the churches of Pallisser

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Madayikonam
topPlaces.description: Madayikonam is a village in Irinjalakuda municipality of Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Cheruval
topPlaces.description: Cheruval is a village in Thrissur district of Kerala, India. The main festivals of this village are the football tournament and "Desavilakku".

topPlaces.name: S. N. H. S. S., Irinjalakuda
topPlaces.description: S. N. H. S. S., Irinjalakuda, a school in Kattungachira, Irinjalakuda, in the Kerala state of India, was established by the Late Shri C.R. Keshavan Vaidyar and managed by the Chandrika Educational Trust. It was established in October 1966.

image.alt: S. N. H. S. S., Irinjalakuda

topPlaces.name: Karuvannoor
topPlaces.description: Karuvannoor is a village in Irinjalakuda municipality of Trichur, Kerala, India bordered by Urakam and Arattupuzha in the North and Moorkanade, Mapranam and Karalam in the south. The Karuvannur river passes through the village, resulting in its name.

topPlaces.name: Thottippal
topPlaces.description: Thottippal is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. It is a part of Parappukkara Grama Panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Thottipal Bhagavati Temple
topPlaces.description: Thottipal Bhagavati Temple is a Bhagavathi temple located in Thrissur District of Kerala state. It is one of the 108 Devi temples installed by Parashurama.

topPlaces.name: Arattupuzha Temple
topPlaces.description: The Arattupuzha Sastha Temple is a Hindu temple situated at Arattupuzha in Thrissur district of Kerala in India, administered by Cochin Devaswom Board.

topPlaces.name: Muriyad
topPlaces.description: Muriyad is a village in Mukundapuram taluk Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Holy Cross Shrine Mapranam?
faq.a: The best time to visit Holy Cross Shrine Mapranam is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Holy Cross Shrine Mapranam?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (32 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (46 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Holy Cross Shrine Mapranam?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Holy Cross Shrine Mapranam at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Holy Cross Shrine Mapranam?
faq.a: Stays in Holy Cross Shrine Mapranam start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Holy Cross Shrine Mapranam?
faq.a: The top attractions are Madayikonam, Cheruval, S. N. H. S. S., Irinjalakuda, Karuvannoor, Thottippal.
